characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Agent Mulder: Usually the most gullible one in the group and easily falls for the other's fake stories or tricks. Brooding Boy, Gentle Girl: Can be the Brooding Boy to Tortoise's Gentle Girl. Butt-Monkey: Usually the main victim for tricks or other problems because of how gullible he is. Catchphrase: "A game? I love games!" Cowardly Lion: Despite all his energy and excitement, he can still be scared quite easily.

characters.name: Lion
characters.description: Agent Mulder: Usually the most gullible one in the group and easily falls for the other's fake stories or tricks. Brooding Boy, Gentle Girl: Can be the Brooding Boy to Tortoise's Gentle Girl. Butt-Monkey: Usually the main victim for tricks or other problems because of how gullible he is. Catchphrase: "A game? I love games!" Cowardly Lion: Despite all his energy and excitement, he can still be scared quite easily.

characters.name: Panda
characters.description: Achievements in Ignorance: Play with in "Sports Day" where she just throws the rock during shot put just to get it over wish after being tired of the games. But by doing so, she ends up coming first and starts enjoying herself again. Aesop Amnesia: At the end of each episode that involves her, she learns the hard way that being lazy doesn't pay off and she has to work hard to. Cut the next episode and she's back to being her lazy self again. Berserk Button: She gets really offended when people call her Lazy, Incompetent, Clumsy or a Coward and will stop at nothing to prove otherwise. Big Damn Heroes: In "Emergency Rescue", she manages to rescue Lion from falling off the bridge. Despite Dragon and Tortoise being involved in the rescue, she is given all the credit at the end. Damsel in Distress: Happens to her twice.She almost falls off the bridge in "Tortoise The Hero" and is rescued by Tortoise.She ends up falling off a cliff in "Missing Friends" and is rescued by Dragon.

characters.name: Tortoise
characters.description: Agent Scully: She never falls for Lion or Panda's made up stories or lies and is usually the one who has to sort things out. All of the Other Reindeer: She often gets teased because she is the slowest in the group which always really upsets her. Big Damn Heroes: In "Tortoise The Hero", she manages to rescue Panda from falling off the bridge. Brooding Boy, Gentle Girl: Can be the Gentle Girl to Lion's Brooding Boy. Damsel in Distress: In "Upside Down Tortoise" Lion's over excitement for using the See-Saw has her flipped upside down. she bans both of them from using it until she is flipped right way up.

characters.name: Dragon
characters.description: Ban on Magic: He does this to himself in "The Secret Apple Tree" when all of his magic he uses to help his friend backfires. He however changes his mind when his 'Final Spell' is successful. Big Damn Heroes: Has two moments of this.In "Emergency rescue", he manages to grab Lion's tail just in time as he's falling off the bridge.In "Missing Friends", he manages to rescue Panda from falling off a cliff. In "Emergency rescue", he manages to grab Lion's tail just in time as he's falling off the bridge. In "Missing Friends", he manages to rescue Panda from falling off a cliff. Breath Weapon: He summons his magical dragon breath by blowing smoke from his mouth.
